intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with a standard scanpy QC→normalization→clustering pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan before executing:

input.title: scRNA-seq QC + Clustering of GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: Standard end-to-end processing: QC metrics, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, neighborhood graph, UMAP, Leiden clustering, and marker gene identification.
input.rationale: Fast first-pass analysis to explore cell types and quality of the sample before deeper work.
input.assumptions:
- Using the first sample (GSM5746259, Day 0, 7,532 cells)
  - QC thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial fraction < 20%
  - Normalization: CPM (counts per million, 1e4)
  - Highly variable genes: default scanpy selection
  - Leiden resolution: 1.0 (default)
  - Output: QC plots, HVG/variance plots, UMAP, cluster markers
input.steps:
<step>
    <title>Load the first sample from the combined h5ad</title>
    <description>Extract GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0) from the registered dataset</description>
    <expected_outputs>AnnData object with 7,532 cells × 36,601 genes</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Calculate QC metrics</title>
    <description>Add n_genes, n_counts, and percent mitochondrial genes to .obs</description>
    <expected_outputs>QC metrics added to adata.obs; QC distribution plots</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Filter cells</title>
    <description>Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or pct_mito > 0.20</description>
    <expected_outputs>Filtered cell count; before/after comparison</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Normalize and log-transform</title>
    <description>CPM normalization (1e4) + log1p</description>
    <expected_outputs>Normalized expression layer</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Identify highly variable genes (HVG)</title>
    <description>Select top ~2,000 HVGs; plot variance explained</description>
    <expected_outputs>HVG list + variance plot</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>PCA + neighborhood graph</title>
    <description>PCA on HVGs, then k-NN graph (k=15)</description>
    <expected_outputs>PCA variance explained; .obsm['X_pca']</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>UMAP + Leiden clustering</title>
    <description>UMAP layout on neighborhood graph; Leiden clustering (res=1.0)</description>
    <expected_outputs>UMAP coordinates; cluster assignments in .obs['leiden']</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Identify cluster markers</title>
    <description>Wilcoxon rank-sum test for DE genes per cluster</description>
    <expected_outputs>Top markers per cluster (logfoldchange, p-value, pct_nonnull)</expected_outputs>
  </step>
  <step>
    <title>Save and export results</title>
    <description>Save processed object (.h5ad); export QC plots and UMAP</description>
    <expected_outputs>Processed AnnData, PNG figures for QC, HVG, UMAP, and marker tables (CSV)</expected_outputs>
  </step>
